title: Synthesus Character Knowledge Graph
description: Entity knowledge base. Defines what the character KNOWS about the world — people, places, items, factions, events.

entity_type.description: What kind of thing this entity is.

display_name.description: How the NPC refers to this entity (e.g., 'Tomás', 'The Northern Road').

depth.description: How well the NPC knows this entity. Affects confidence: intimate=0.95, familiar=0.85, acquainted=0.75, rumor=0.60, unknown=0.30.

description.description: What the NPC says when asked about this entity. Written in first person, in-character.

relationship_to_npc.description: How the NPC relates to this entity (e.g., 'my driver', 'a rival', 'my home city').

emotion_variants.description: Emotion → alternate description. Keys are emotion names (afraid, friendly, sad, etc.).

related_entities.description: IDs of related entities for multi-hop queries.

aliases.description: Alternate names/phrases that should match this entity (e.g., 'your driver', 'the blacksmith').

topics.description: Topic tags this entity is relevant to (e.g., 'quest', 'world_info', 'shopping').

secret_description.description: Trust-gated knowledge. Only shared when player trust >= trust_threshold.

trust_threshold.description: Trust score required to unlock secret_description.
